partnerBelief.summary: Partner (P2) has 3 cards and has not yet acted. They may be able to beat a 3♥ with a heart or trump, but I cannot assume they will. They have no public signals beyond the initial deal.

opponentBelief.summary: Player 0 led 3♥ and is down to 2 cards, suggesting they are trying to shed cards quickly. Player 3 (other opponent) has 3 cards and acts after partner.
